en: Now Jericho was shut up inside and outside because of the people of Israel. None went out, and none came in.
zh: 耶利哥的城門因以色列人的緣故，就緊緊地關閉，沒有人出入。

en: And the LORD said to Joshua, "See, I have given Jericho into your hand, with its king and mighty men of valor.
zh: 耶和華對約書亞說：“看，我已經把耶利哥和耶利哥的王，以及英勇的戰士，都交在你的手中了。

en: You shall march around the city, all the men of war going around the city once. Thus shall you do for six days.
zh: 你們所有能作戰的男丁要圍繞這城，一天圍繞一次，六天都要這樣行；

en: Seven priests shall bear seven trumpets of rams' horns before the ark. On the seventh day you shall march around the city seven times, and the priests shall blow the trumpets.
zh: 並派七個祭司拿著七個羊角，走在約櫃的前面；到第七天，你們要繞城七次，祭司也要吹角。

en: And when they make a long blast with the ram's horn, when you hear the sound of the trumpet, then all the people shall shout with a great shout, and the wall of the city will fall down flat, and the people shall go up, everyone straight before him."
zh: 當羊角吹起長號，你們聽見角聲的時候，全體人民要大聲呼喊，那時城牆就必塌陷；你們各人要向前直衝。”

en: So Joshua the son of Nun called the priests and said to them, "Take up the ark of the covenant and let seven priests bear seven trumpets of rams' horns before the ark of the LORD."
zh: 於是嫩的兒子約書亞把祭司召了來，對他們說：“你們要抬起約櫃；並派七個祭司拿著七個羊角，走在耶和華約櫃的前面。”

en: And he said to the people, "Go forward. March around the city and let the armed men pass on before the ark of the LORD."
zh: 他又對人民說：“你們前去繞城吧，拿武器的人要走在耶和華約櫃的前面。”

en: And just as Joshua had commanded the people, the seven priests bearing the seven trumpets of rams' horns before the LORD went forward, blowing the trumpets, with the ark of the covenant of the LORD following them.
zh: 約書亞吩咐人民以後，七個祭司拿著七個羊角，走在耶和華的前面，並且吹角，耶和華的約櫃在他們後面跟著走。

en: The armed men were walking before the priests who were blowing the trumpets, and the rear guard was walking after the ark, while the trumpets blew continually.
zh: 拿武器的人走在吹角的祭司前面，在約櫃後面也有防衛的隊伍跟著走，祭司一面走，一面吹角。

en: But Joshua commanded the people, "You shall not shout or make your voice heard, neither shall any word go out of your mouth, until the day I tell you to shout. Then you shall shout."
zh: 約書亞吩咐人民說：“你們不可呼喊，不可讓人聽見你們的聲音，連一句話也不可出口，等到我吩咐你們‘呼喊’的那天，你們才可以呼喊。”

en: So he caused the ark of the LORD to circle the city, going about it once. And they came into the camp and spent the night in the camp.
zh: 這樣，耶和華的約櫃繞城而行，圍繞了一次，眾人就回到營中，在營裡住宿。

en: Then Joshua rose early in the morning, and the priests took up the ark of the LORD.
zh: 約書亞清早起來，祭司又抬起耶和華的約櫃。

en: And the seven priests bearing the seven trumpets of rams' horns before the ark of the LORD walked on, and they blew the trumpets continually. And the armed men were walking before them, and the rear guard was walking after the ark of the LORD, while the trumpets blew continually.
zh: 拿著七個羊角的七位祭司，走在耶和華的約櫃前面；一面走，一面吹角；拿武器的人走在他們前面，在耶和華的約櫃後面也有防衛的隊伍跟著走；祭司一面走，一面吹角。

en: And the second day they marched around the city once, and returned into the camp. So they did for six days.
zh: 第二日，眾人又繞城一次，然後回到營裡去；六日他們都是這樣行。

en: On the seventh day they rose early, at the dawn of day, and marched around the city in the same manner seven times. It was only on that day that they marched around the city seven times.
zh: 到了第七日，清早黎明的時候，他們起來，以同樣的方式繞城七次；只有這一日，他們繞城七次。

en: And at the seventh time, when the priests had blown the trumpets, Joshua said to the people, "Shout, for the LORD has given you the city.
zh: 到了第七次，祭司吹角的時候，約書亞就對人民說：“你們呼喊吧，因為耶和華已經把這城賜給你們了。

en: And the city and all that is within it shall be devoted to the LORD for destruction. Only Rahab the prostitute and all who are with her in her house shall live, because she hid the messengers whom we sent.
zh: 這城要完全毀滅，城和城中的一切都歸耶和華；只有妓女喇合，和所有與她在家中的都可以存活，因為她收藏了我們派去的使者。

en: But you, keep yourselves from the things devoted to destruction, lest when you have devoted them you take any of the devoted things and make the camp of Israel a thing for destruction and bring trouble upon it.
zh: 不過你們要謹慎，不可取那當毀滅的物，恐怕你們貪心，取了那當毀滅的物，就使以色列營成為當毀滅的，使以色列營遭遇災禍。

en: But all silver and gold, and every vessel of bronze and iron, are holy to the LORD; they shall go into the treasury of the LORD."
zh: 可是，所有的金銀和銅鐵的器皿，都要歸耶和華為聖，存入耶和華的庫房中。”

en: So the people shouted, and the trumpets were blown. As soon as the people heard the sound of the trumpet, the people shouted a great shout, and the wall fell down flat, so that the people went up into the city, every man straight before him, and they captured the city.
zh: 於是人民呼喊，祭司也吹角。人民聽見角聲的時候，就大聲呼喊，城牆就塌陷了；於是，人民衝入城中，人人向前，把城攻取。

en: Then they devoted all in the city to destruction, both men and women, young and old, oxen, sheep, and donkeys, with the edge of the sword.
zh: 他們把城中的一切，無論男女老幼、牛羊和驢，都用刀殺盡。

en: But to the two men who had spied out the land, Joshua said, "Go into the prostitute's house and bring out from there the woman and all who belong to her, as you swore to her."
zh: 約書亞對窺探那地的兩個人說：“你們進那妓女的家裡去，照著你們向她所起的誓，把那女人和她所有的一切，都從家裡帶出來。”

en: So the young men who had been spies went in and brought out Rahab and her father and mother and brothers and all who belonged to her. And they brought all her relatives and put them outside the camp of Israel.
zh: 那兩個年輕密探就進去，把喇合和她的父母、兄弟、她所有的一切，以及她所有的親屬，都領出來，安置在以色列的營外。

en: And they burned the city with fire, and everything in it. Only the silver and gold, and the vessels of bronze and of iron, they put into the treasury of the house of the LORD.
zh: 眾人把城和城中的一切都用火燒了；只有金銀和銅鐵的器皿都放入耶和華聖所的庫房裡。

en: But Rahab the prostitute and her father's household and all who belonged to her, Joshua saved alive. And she has lived in Israel to this day, because she hid the messengers whom Joshua sent to spy out Jericho.
zh: 約書亞卻放過妓女喇合和她的父家，以及她所有的一切；她住在以色列中，直到今日，因為她收藏了約書亞派去窺探耶利哥的使者。

en: Joshua laid an oath on them at that time, saying, "Cursed before the LORD be the man who rises up and rebuilds this city, Jericho. "At the cost of his firstborn shall he lay its foundation, and at the cost of his youngest son shall he set up its gates."
zh: 那時，約書亞要人民起誓，說：“起來重建這耶利哥城的，那人在耶和華面前是可咒可詛的；他立地基的時候必喪長子；他安城門的時候必失幼子。”

en: So the LORD was with Joshua, and his fame was in all the land.
zh: 耶和華與約書亞同在；約書亞的名聲傳遍全地。
